positive: A stylized, symmetrical forest scene viewed at twilight. The central subject is a magnificent, bioluminescent stag standing calmly amidst ancient, stylized woodland flora. The stag has glowing antlers and a muscular build, rendered in a clean, graphic, vector-art style with sharp outlines. The composition should be highly balanced and centered, featuring deep emerald and indigo colors contrasted with pops of electric cyan and gold from the glowing elements. The style should emulate Japanese woodblock printing (Ukiyo-e) meets Art Nouveau elegance, optimized for high contrast and readability on fabric. Minimalist backgrounds with maximum visual impact. Cinematic, ultra-detailed, perfect for screen printing.
